Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 692}Guys who can drive are so cool! I end up watching them instead of the scenery outside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 692}...Are you hitting on me? Sorry, but I'm here with my boyfriend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 692}We should get going or we might not make it in time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 692}I wanted to surprise my boyfriend, so I booked a fancy dinner for us![n]{f 1 1}
